summary: `digest`'s biggest-red-surges section reports a real total_tenure_seconds (story lifetime) instead of duplicating red_tenure_seconds.
reason: queryDigestRedSurges set total_tenure_seconds to redTenureSeconds, making the two fields identical. Added a per-story MIN/MAX(captured_at) query against drudge_story so total_tenure_seconds reflects the full lifetime on Drudge regardless of color.
